form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Healesville (20.14) in a Bottom Up - Grade 5, finishing a 12 length fourth. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and two minors. Will need some luck to feature.

form.formComment: Last start finished 5th in a Grade 5 on April 9 over 400m at this track behind Allie beaten 3 lengths (23.54). Key chance on best form.
